---
title: "ggnomics: Pairs Plot (Scatterplot Matrix)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import importlib.util, os
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("mock_data", os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "examples", "00_mock_data.py"))
mock_data = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mock_data)

from ggnomics import plot_pairs

df    = mock_data.make_mock_df(n_cells=500)
adata = mock_data.make_mock_anndata(n_cells=500)
sce   = mock_data.make_mock_sce(n_cells=500)
```

## Overview

`plot_pairs` builds a scatterplot matrix of the first ``n_components``
embedding dimensions.  Each facet ``(row, col)`` shows component ``row``
(y-axis) against component ``col`` (x-axis).  All cells share the same
color mapping.

This is analogous to `scater::plotPCApairs` or `GGally::ggpairs` — useful
for exploring how well the leading PCs separate biological groups.

---

## 1 — PCA pairs (3 × 3), DataFrame

```{python}
p = plot_pairs(df, dimred="PCA", n_components=3, color_by="cluster",
               title="PCA pairs — cluster")
p.save("examples/img/06a_pairs_pca.png", width=8, height=8, dpi=120)
p
```

## 2 — Colour by batch

```{python}
p = plot_pairs(df, dimred="PCA", n_components=3, color_by="batch",
               title="PCA pairs — batch")
p.save("examples/img/06b_pairs_batch.png", width=8, height=8, dpi=120)
p
```

## 3 — UMAP 2 components

```{python}
p = plot_pairs(df, dimred="UMAP", n_components=2,
               title="UMAP pairs")
p.save("examples/img/06c_pairs_umap.png", width=6, height=6, dpi=120)
p
```

## 4 — AnnData PCA

```{python}
p = plot_pairs(adata, dimred="X_pca", n_components=4, color_by="cluster",
               title="AnnData PCA pairs")
p.save("examples/img/06d_pairs_adata.png", width=9, height=9, dpi=120)
p
```

## 5 — SCE PCA

```{python}
p = plot_pairs(sce, dimred="PCA", n_components=3, color_by="cluster",
               title="SCE PCA pairs")
p.save("examples/img/06e_pairs_sce.png", width=8, height=8, dpi=120)
p
```

---

## Key parameters

| Parameter | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `dimred` | Embedding key |
| `n_components` | Number of components to include |
| `color_by` | Obs column for point color |
| `size` | Point size (`None` → adaptive) |
| `alpha` | Point transparency |
